question: [File: 'File Name: importer/src/main/java/org/hiero/mirror/importer/downloader/balance/AccountBalancesDownloader.java -> Scope: High: Any impacts caused by Tampering with submitted transactions'] [Function: verifySignatures()] Can an unprivileged external user tamper with a balance file to cause `verify(streamFile, signature)` to throw `HashMismatchException` for all nodes, causing `verifySignatures()` to return false and `log.error('None of the data files could be verified')`, but without any circuit-breaker that would prevent the same tampered file from being retried indefinitely?
